name: Chicken and Chestnuts
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Skinned and boned chicken, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1/2 packet Instant chicken broth & seasoning mix (1/2 teaspoon)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine chicken and soy sauce; cover with plastic wrap and let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes.
2. In a 9-inch skillet or wok, heat peanut oil over medium heat. Add bell pepper, scallion, garlic, and ginger; sauté until vegetables are tender, about 2 minutes.
3. Drain chicken, reserving marinade. Add chicken to the vegetable mixture, a few pieces at a time, stirring after each addition.
4. Add chestnuts and increase heat to high. Cook, stirring constantly, until chicken begins to brown, about 2 minutes.
5. Stir in water, sherry, and broth mix; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 1 minute.
6. To the reserved marinade, add cornstarch, sugar, sesame oil, and pepper; stir to dissolve cornstarch. Pour over chicken mixture and, stirring constantly, bring to a boil until thickened.
